name: Southwest Vegetable Paella
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 10 oz can diced tomatoes with green chiles
1 15 oz can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 11 oz can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic; cook until tender (about 4-5 minutes).
2. Stir in rice, vegetable broth, diced tomatoes with green chiles, turmeric, and red pepper flakes.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in black beans and corn; cover and cook an additional 5 minutes.
